Title: Analyst
Text:
Purpose-driven healthcare data scientist who partners closely with clinicians and managers to improve decision-making
through thoughtful analytics. Comfortable tackling routine, messy, and complex problems alike—finding scalable,
repeatable solutions that strengthen systems over time. I bring strong critical thinking, clear communication, and a
learning mindset to every engagement, using AI as a tool rather than a substitute for judgment.

Title: Analyst
Text: LLM Fine-Tuning & Evaluation (Healthcare Analytics): Fine Tuned a LLM on laboratory data, and evaluated against baseline LLM, allowing for open discussion on tradeoffs.

Title: Analyst
Text: Created an automated process using Cursor AI to interpret complex SQL code and craft operational definitions and examples for over 100 Key Performance Indicators. This allows our AI Chat Bot to answer customer questions within the context of the metric.

Title: Analyst
Text: Innovative Problem Solving in Analytics: Developed and implemented one robust database design to store customer- specific population management data; easy to maintain but flexible enough so each customer can define their own population management metrics. Used by all of our customers

Title: Analyst
Text: Collaborative Leadership in Technical Projects: Led end-to-end database releases, including overall coordination , regression testing, and troubleshooting critical issues for high-profile deliverables.

Title: Analyst
Text: Data-Driven Insights and Quality Improvements: Analyzed and resolved complex bugs, conducted deep dives into data quality issues, and implemented solutions that improved reporting accuracy. Delivered insightful visualizations to support decision-making and client communication.

Title: Owner
Text: Pro-bono data analysis for mission driven non profits.

learning.

Text:

Title: Data scientist
Text: Profiled incoming telemetry data in real time to detect issues and anomalies.
